title: Nagumo Song Lyrics Arunachalam
stanzas:
Nagumo yei sugamo
vetkam vidumo
muththam podum podhu
moodum ilankodi.

Nagumo yei sugamo
vetkam thagumo
muththam podum podhu
aadumm ilankodi.

Nagumo yei sugamo
vetkam vidumo
muththam podum podhu
moodum ilankodi.
nagumo....

vellik kolusugal oasai oasi ida
velli kizhamaiyil aasai aasai vara
mutham tharugaiyil
meesa meesa andhu mogam
thoondi viduthe..

uchchanthaliyila ennai enni kondu
ullangalvarai pinni pinni kondu
mutham tharugaiyil mogamaana
kili udhattai kadichi vittathe.

nesamaa, nesanthaan
kaayamaa paarammaa
re re ga pa ba ga
re re ga pa ba ga
ga re sa re sa ni
sa ni tha pa sa re.

Nagumo yei sugamo
vetkam vidumo
muththam podum podhu
aadumm ilankodi.
nagumo..

Alli malarvadhu
ivaru nerathula
malli malarvadhu
maalai nerathula
penmai malarvadhu
endha nerathula engu
kandu pudicha..

kattai viral kondu
kolam podugaiyil
kannin kadai vizhi
saaindhu moodugaiyil
kaalin kolusugal
thaalam maarugaiyil
penmai malarndhu nirkkume.

sariyaa sarithaa
parisu idhuthaan.
re re ga pa ba ga
re re ga pa ba ga
ga re sa re sa ni
sa ni tha pa sa re.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nagumo'?

The song 'Nagumo' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic moments.

In which movie does 'Nagumo' appear?

'Nagumo' is featured in the movie Arunachalam, which showcases themes of love and devotion.

Who are the singers of 'Nagumo'?

The song is beautifully sung by K.S. Chithra and S.P. Balasubramaniam, two legendary voices in Tamil music.

When was 'Nagumo' released?

'Nagumo' was released on April 10, 1997, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Nagumo' from the movie Arunachalam is a heartfelt duet that encapsulates the beauty of love and longing. With its soothing melody and poignant lyrics by Vairamuthu, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The collaboration between K.S. Chithra and S.P. Balasubramaniam brings an enchanting quality to the song, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. Overall, 'Nagumo' is a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nagumo is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. Featuring the enchanting voices of K.S. Chithra and S.P. Balasubramaniam, this song is a timeless classic that resonates with listeners. The lyrical depth penned by Vairamuthu adds a unique charm to this unforgettable melody from the movie Arunachalam.
stanzaMeanings: Nagumo, are you feeling good? Will the worries go away when the kisses are given?
Nagumo, are you feeling good? Will the worries go away when the kisses are given while dancing?
Nagumo, are you feeling good? Will the worries go away when the kisses are given? Nagumo...
In the silver light, the sounds of the silver bells bring desires. In the silver twilight, the kisses will come, and the joy will spread.
In the high place, taking me along, the joy will come, and the beautiful bird will break free from the cage.
True love, sweet love, is it real? re re ga pa ba ga re re ga pa ba ga ga re sa re sa ni sa ni tha pa sa re.
Nagumo, are you feeling good? Will the worries go away when the kisses are given while dancing? Nagumo...
The flower blooms at this time, and again it blooms in the evening. When does the woman bloom? Where did she find it?
With a stick in hand, drawing patterns, the eyes of the beloved will close, and the rhythm of the feet will change, while the woman stands blooming.
This is the right way, this is the gift. re re ga pa ba ga re re ga pa ba ga ga re sa re sa ni sa ni tha pa sa re.
